title: Crispy Squid Croquettes with Chinese Dipping Sauce
description: Crispy squid croquettes served with a sweet and sour Chinese dipping sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Prepare the squid croquettes according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, mix together the Chinese Dipping Sauce, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Add the bamboo shoots to the sauce mixture and stir well.
Dredge the squid croquettes in cornstarch before frying.
Fry the squid croquettes in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fried squid croquettes on paper towels.
Serve the squid croquettes with the dipping sauce and garnish with sliced Spanish onion.
